metadata.title: SiteSnap — Capture Any Website as PDF
metadata.description: Enter a URL and instantly generate a PDF snapshot of any website. Edit, annotate, and download — all in your browser.
metadata.editDescription: Edit your captured PDF — add text annotations, remove pages, and download your customized document.

hero.title: Capture Any Website as PDF
hero.subtitle: Enter a URL, get a pixel-perfect PDF in seconds. Edit, annotate, and download — no signup required.

errors.urlInvalid: Please enter a valid URL (e.g. https://example.com)

edit.title: Edit PDF
edit.noPdf: No PDF loaded. Go back to the homepage to generate one.

layers.title: Layers
layers.deleteDescription: This annotation will be permanently removed.

fast.title: Lightning Fast
fast.description: Generate PDFs in seconds with our optimized rendering engine.

private.title: 100% Private
private.description: PDFs are generated in memory and streamed directly to you. Nothing is stored.

edit.title: Built-in Editor
edit.description: Add text annotations, remove pages, and download your customized PDF.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.pdfTooLarge: The generated PDF exceeds the maximum size limit.

errors.turnstileFailed: Security verification failed. Please try again.

projects.projectLimitReached: You have reached your project limit.

projects.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this project? This action cannot be undone.

dashboard.roleRestricted: You do not have permission to access this page.

myAccount.changePasswordDescription: Update your password to keep your account secure.
myAccount.setPasswordDescription: You signed in with a social provider. Set a password to also sign in with email.
myAccount.name: Name
myAccount.passwordChangeRestricted: Password change is restricted, contact sys admin.

myAccount.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.
deleteAccount.warning: This action cannot be undone. All your projects, files, and subscription will be permanently deleted.
deleteAccount.adminCannotDelete: Admin accounts cannot be deleted from this page.
deleteAccount.cancelSubscriptionFailed: Failed to cancel your subscription. Please try again.
deleteAccount.deleteFilesFailed: Failed to delete your files. Please try again.
deleteAccount.deleteFailed: Failed to delete your account. Please try again.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.cancelRequiredDescription: To switch to a new plan, please cancel your current subscription first.
subscription.subscriptionsDisabledDescription: Subscriptions have been disabled by the administrator. Please contact the admin for more information.
subscription.planChangePending: Your plan change is being processed. It may take 10-20 seconds to update. Please refresh the page.
subscription.cancelConfirmDescription: Are you sure? Canceling your subscription will immediately stop access to all paid features. This action cannot be undone.

hero.subtitle: Capture, annotate, save, and share websites in seconds. Built for designers, developers, researchers, and teams.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Description: Paste any website link and instantly generate a high-quality PDF.
howItWorks.step2Description: Highlight, comment, and draw directly on the captured document.
howItWorks.step3Description: Store projects, collaborate via link, and export anytime.

testimonials.title: What Our Users Say
testimonials.quote1: SiteSnap completely changed how I capture client websites — fast, editable, and sharable in seconds!
testimonials.quote2: I save hours every week. Annotating PDFs and sharing with my team has never been easier.
testimonials.quote3: The perfect tool for collaborative design reviews. Simple, clean, and reliable.
testimonials.quote4: From free to pro, the workflow is seamless. PDF captures, annotations, and sharing — all in one place.

cta.title: Start Capturing Websites Today
cta.subtitle: Create your first annotated PDF in seconds.
